title: CF Industries and LOTTE CHEMICAL Corporation to Explore Joint U.S.-Based Clean Ammonia Project and Long-Term Clean Ammonia Offtake Agreement into South Korea

(NYSE: CF), the world’s largest producer of ammonia, today announced that it has entered into a memorandum of understanding (MOU) with LOTTE CHEMICAL Corporation (011170.KS) (“LOTTE”), South Korea’s leading chemical company, that will guide the companies in a joint exploration of clean ammonia production and long-term clean ammonia offtake […]...

title: CF Industries and LOTTE CHEMICAL Corporation to Explore Joint U.S.-Based Clean Ammonia Project and Long-Term Clean Ammonia Offtake Agreement into South Korea
text: DEERFIELD, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--CF Industries Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CF), the world's largest producer of ammonia, today announced that it has entered into a memorandum of understanding (MOU) with LOTTE CHEMICAL Corporation (011170.KS) (“LOTTE”), South Korea's leading chemical company, that will guide the companies in a joint exploration of clean ammonia production and long-term clean ammonia offtake into South Korea.

title: CF Industries Holdings, Inc. (CF) Is a Trending Stock: Facts to Know Before Betting on It
text: CF (CF) has received quite a bit of attention from Zacks.com users lately. Therefore, it is wise to be aware of the facts that can impact the stock's prospects.

title: CF Industries Remains Significantly Undervalued
text: In this article, I start by assessing the nitrogen fertilizer bull case, which has weakened a bit since last year. Slower demand and lower overseas natural gas prices have pressured CF shares. However, these headwinds are fading as demand is expected to rebound, putting a floor under prices.

title: CF Industries Holdings, Inc. to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conferences
text: DEERFIELD, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--CF Industries Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CF) today announced that the Company will present at the following conferences in February: Citi's 2023 Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference at 9:40 am ET on Tuesday, February 21, 2023; Barclays Industrial Select Conference at 10:55 am ET on Wednesday, February 22, 2023. Investors who wish to access the live conference webcasts should visit the Investor Relations section of the company's website at www.cfindustries.

title: CF Industries' (CF) Q4 Earnings Beat, Sales Lag Estimates
text: CF Industries (CF) Q4 performance rides on the increase in nitrogen prices due to supply chain disruption resulting from higher energy prices & lower operating rates.

title: CF Industries (CF) Q4 Earnings Surpass Estimates
text: CF (CF) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 5.33% and 7.33%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: CF Industries Holdings, Inc. Reports Full Year 2022 Net Earnings of $3.35 Billion, Adjusted EBITDA of $5.88 Billion
text: DEERFIELD, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--CF Industries Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CF), a leading global manufacturer of hydrogen and nitrogen products, today announced results for the full year and fourth quarter ended December 31, 2022. Highlights Full year net earnings of $3.35 billion(1), or $16.38 per diluted share, EBITDA(2) of $5.54 billion, and adjusted EBITDA(2) of $5.88 billion Fourth quarter net earnings of $860 million(1), or $4.35 per diluted share, EBITDA(2) of $1.

title: CF Industries Announces Purchase of 2.2 Billion Cubic Feet of Natural Gas Certified by MiQ to Have 90% Lower Methane Emissions Intensity than Industry Average
text: DEERFIELD, Ill, & NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--As part of its commitment to reduce its scope 3 emissions by 10% by 2030 and to reduce the lifecycle carbon intensity of ammonia production, CF Industries Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CF) today announced that it has entered into an agreement with bp (NYSE: BP) for the supply of 2.2 billion cubic feet (BCF) of certified natural gas in 2023.

title: Is a Surprise Coming for CF Industries (CF) This Earnings Season?
text: CF Industries (CF) is seeing favorable earnings estimate revision activity and has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP heading into earnings season.

title: 3 Fertilizer Stocks to Watch Amid Industry Challenges
text: A retreat in fertilizer prices from record highs on softer demand and a spike in key raw material costs pose headwinds for the Zacks Fertilizers industry. SQM, CF and IPI are poised well to tackle the challenges.
